chapter_title.en: When he gave the standard of the Battle of the Camel to his son Mohammad

text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) لابنه محمّد بن الحنفية لمّا أعطاه الراية يوم الجمل

en.sayed-ali-raza: Delivered in the Battle of Jamal when Amīr al-mu’minīn gave the standard to his son Muḥammad ibn al-Ḥanafiyyah [1]
